unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* only acknowledge colon or equals as separators if the option was not specified with an initial dash! */
unit.function_decl: static bool my_get_line(FILE *fp, struct curlx_dynbuf *, bool *error);

function.name: execpath

unit.comment: /* return 0 on everything-is-fine, and non-zero otherwise */

function.name: parseconfig

unit.comment: /* * Copies the string from line to the buffer at param, unquoting * backslash-quoted characters and NUL-terminating the output string. * Stops at the first non-backslash-quoted double quote character or the * end of the input string. param must be at least as long as the input * string. Returns the pointer after the last handled input character. */

function.name: unslashquote
my_get_line
